title: Persistence / PostgreSQL / Migration Readiness
context: GL-202 follows GL-200A/B/C tenant/workspace isolation and GL-201 auth/secrets/config hardening. Hardens persistence, migration runner, PostgreSQL readiness, and migration-operational safety. GrantLayer remains Developer Preview / Controlled Preview — not production SaaS.
scope: Migration runner error context and dry-run API
Audit events backfill incompatibility fix (migration 0010 vs immutability trigger)
Migration ordering, idempotency, and failure-safety verification
Audit hash-chain integrity across migration paths
non_goals: New auth provider or broad CORS redesign
Live PostgreSQL test infrastructure (not available locally)

current_persistence_summary.connection_wrapper: _ConnectionWrapper with ? to %s placeholder translation for PostgreSQL
current_persistence_summary.connection_pool: psycopg2 SimpleConnectionPool with bounded retry for PostgreSQL

migration_runner_assessment.failure_behavior_note: apply_fn wrapped in RuntimeError with version context; failed migration not marked applied
migration_runner_assessment.legacy_db_behavior: Marks all migrations applied without re-running; intentional for pre-migration-runner developer DBs

sqlite_readiness_assessment.verdict: READY for controlled Developer Preview usage

postgresql_readiness_assessment.verdict: Substantially hardened; NOT live-validated without PostgreSQL instance
postgresql_readiness_assessment.executescript_bug_description: PostgreSQL executescript skipped SQL statements with leading line comments — fixed by stripping comments before executing
remaining_gaps: No live end-to-end PostgreSQL integration test
pg_stat_activity privilege may need pg_monitor role in hardened environments

gl200_tenant_schema_assessment.backfill_bug_description: Migration 0010 attempted UPDATE audit_events SET tenant_id='demo' WHERE tenant_id IS NULL. This conflicts with the audit immutability trigger (migration 0005) on any DB with existing audit events. Fixed by removing the UPDATE from the nullable path; pre-migration events keep tenant_id=NULL (fail-closed).

audit_immutability_assessment.hash_payload_dual_mode_description: tenant_id included in canonical payload only when non-None, matching the format used at write time for both pre-migration (None) and post-migration (set) events

constraints_indexes_assessment.deferred_reason: Deferred to dedicated controlled migration issue; not needed at Developer Preview scale

implemented_changes.change: Fix executescript PostgreSQL path to strip leading line comments before executing SQL chunks
Wrap apply_fn in RuntimeError with migration version context; add list_pending_migrations()
Remove backfill UPDATE from nullable (audit_events) path; add explanatory comment
New GL-202 test suite (12 test classes, ~40 test methods)

coverage: Runner raises with context on apply failure
Audit events NULL tenant_id not backfilled
IF NOT EXISTS / existence guards in migrations
DB URL password not in error messages

remaining_gaps.description: No live PostgreSQL integration test infrastructure
remaining_gaps.resolution: Deferred; requires PostgreSQL instance not available locally

remaining_gaps.description: Legacy DB detection marks all migrations applied without running them
remaining_gaps.resolution: Documented; only affects developer environments pre-dating the migration runner; these DBs are assumed to have the full schema

remaining_gaps.description: Production-grade indexes (audit_events.timestamp, subject_id, etc.) not added
remaining_gaps.resolution: Deferred to dedicated controlled migration issue
Requires live PostgreSQL; deferred to PostgreSQL deployment readiness gate
Use pg_monitor role in hardened PostgreSQL environments; documented

production_readiness_impact: GL-202 hardens the migration path for Developer Preview. Migration errors are more diagnostic, PostgreSQL executescript is correct for commented SQL, audit hash-chain integrity is preserved, and dry-run inspection is available. GrantLayer remains not production-SaaS-ready. PostgreSQL deployment requires live integration testing before any real data.
decision_rationale: Concrete bugs found and fixed (executescript comment skip, audit_events backfill vs immutability trigger). Gaps are documented. GL-201 and GL-200 behavior preserved. No regressions introduced.

recommended_next_issues.description: Merge gl-202-persistence-postgres-migration-readiness to internal main after validation
API Contract / SDK Packaging Decision after GL-202 is merged
